description: In this episode, Maz, founder and CEO of Soul Sniper, discusses the journey of his NFT analytics platform, its recent acquisition by Fantom, and the challenges faced in the crypto space.
topic_summary: Maz shares the story of Soul Sniper, from its inception during his NFT trading days on Solana to its evolution into a comprehensive analytics tool and marketplace, culminating in its acquisition by Fantom [t=106:73].
